# Transcrição: 6-03 Be the Most Ethical Person You Know

- **Fonte:** 6-03 Be the Most Ethical Person You Know
- **Duração:** 01:51
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:51]

Be the most ethical person you know. Now look, I'm not talking about cash register honesty here. I'm not talking about you go to church once a week and the rest of the week you do whatever you want. I'm talking about ethics here. I'm talking about you being an example of the most ethical person you know. And that doesn't mean you're just honest, John or honest Jill, and you tell everybody the truth and you're just the most honest person on planet earth. I'm talking about real ethics. And you know what real ethics are for me, at least for me? I gotta get the job done. I gotta go produce in the marketplace. I can't just be honest with everybody else and then not be honest with myself. I gotta get things done. I gotta finish the mission. I gotta complete. I gotta be the person, ethical person people can depend on. Look, just because you're honest about everything and you don't get the job done, how is that ethical? I challenge you to look at that. Oh, Grant, I would never lie to anybody about anything. Yeah, but you're not getting the job done. See, be the most ethical person you know. You're honest. You don't rip people off. You don't lie to people, but you also do whatever it takes to get the job done so you can provide for yourself, your family, your business. So you're a role model for the community and people look at you like, man, that guy's like a super human, like a character out of some comic book. And I can't find anything he does wrong. You know, there's no dirt on him. He's got clean hands. He's ethical. He gets the job done and you become a role model for other people about how to be effective in the marketplace and be ethical all at the same time, which I think is the true meaning of ethics. That you're the most ethical person in every way, not just honest John.
